summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Settings Portal completed. Found and fixed 2 critical bugs: 1) Route was mapped to PlaceholderPage instead of AdminSettings component, 2) Token localStorage key mismatch ('token' vs 'eaziwage_token'). All 24 backend API tests pass. All 7 frontend tabs load and work correctly after fixes.
passed_tests: BACKEND: Admin login authentication working (24/24 tests pass)
FRONTEND: Admin Settings Portal page loads correctly after route fix
FRONTEND: All 7 tabs visible (Global Settings, Employer Config, Employee Config, Risk & Compliance, Notifications, Blackout Periods, Legal Documents)
FRONTEND: Global Settings tab - EWA limits, fees, cooldown sliders working
FRONTEND: Employer Config tab - Employer list loads with search functionality
FRONTEND: Employee Config tab - Employee list loads with search functionality
FRONTEND: Risk & Compliance tab - Risk thresholds and auto-actions configurable
FRONTEND: Notifications tab - Email/SMS notification toggles working
FRONTEND: Blackout Periods tab - Add/Edit/Delete blackout periods working
FRONTEND: Legal Documents tab - Document list with edit capability
FRONTEND: Save Settings button triggers API call and shows success toast

bugs_fixed.issue: Admin Settings route was mapped to PlaceholderPage instead of AdminSettings component
bugs_fixed.fix: Imported AdminSettings and updated route from PlaceholderPage to AdminSettings component

bugs_fixed.issue: Token localStorage key mismatch - using 'token' instead of 'eaziwage_token'
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed localStorage.getItem('token') to localStorage.getItem('eaziwage_token') on line 1772

critical_code_review_comments: All admin pages should use consistent localStorage key 'eaziwage_token' for token storage
Route mappings should be verified against actual component implementations
ReactHook useEffect has missing dependencies in several tabs - consider adding to dependency arrays
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create TEST blackout periods which are set to inactive
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Settings Portal is fully functional at /admin/settings route. The portal has 7 tabs: Global Settings (EWA limits, fees, cooldown), Employer Config (per-employer settings), Employee Config (per-employee overrides), Risk & Compliance (risk thresholds tied to Fraud Detection), Notifications (email/SMS alerts), Blackout Periods (CRUD for advance blackouts), Legal Documents (Employee Terms, Employer Partnership, Privacy Policy). All settings persist to MongoDB via /api/admin/settings/* endpoints. Token is stored in localStorage under 'eaziwage_token' key.
